ProfessorEvaluationSetup.accessDeniedMessage: You must be logged in as a professor to access this configuration panel.
ProfessorEvaluationSetup.title: Evaluation Grid Setup
ProfessorEvaluationSetup.description: Design and establish customized grading rubrics, scoring criteria, and weights for oral defenses and project deliverables.

ProfessorCriteriaManager.pointsPositiveError: Max points must be a positive number
ProfessorCriteriaManager.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this criterion? This will also remove any scores recorded for this criterion.
ProfessorCriteriaManager.emptyDesc: There are no evaluation criteria established for this project yet. Use the button below to add your first criterion.
ProfessorCriteriaManager.noProjectsSelectedDesc: Please choose a project from the directory side panel to configure its customizable evaluation grid.
ProfessorCriteriaManager.visibleSuccess: Notation grid is now visible to students
ProfessorCriteriaManager.hiddenSuccess: Notation grid is now hidden from students
ProfessorCriteriaManager.toggleVisibilityError: Failed to update notation grid visibility

ProfessorExport.title: Export Evaluations & Grades
ProfessorExport.description: Generate comprehensive CSV files for Excel, or print/save detailed PDF evaluation sheets of your student groups.
ProfessorExport.selectProjectsDesc: Check the boxes below to choose which projects are included in the generated report.
ProfessorExport.noProjectsSelected: Please select at least one project to export.
ProfessorExport.exportCSVDesc: Download a spreadsheet of all student grades, feedback, and criterion scores separated by semicolons.
ProfessorExport.exportPDFDesc: Open a beautiful print view to print evaluation sheets directly or save them as high-quality PDFs.
ProfessorExport.noTeamsEnrolled: No teams enrolled in this project space.
